---
name: Support / Help Needed
description: Ask for help or report a general issue that's not a bug
title: "[HELP] "
labels: ["question"]
---

## Question / Issue
Please describe your question or issue in detail.

## What Have You Already Tried?
List the troubleshooting steps you've already taken:
- [ ] Cleared addon cache and data
- [ ] Restarted Kodi
- [ ] Reinstalled the addon
- [ ] Checked the README and CHANGELOG
- [ ] Searched existing issues
- [ ] Checked Kodi logs
- [ ] Other: _______________________

---

## System Information
- **Kodi Version:** (e.g., 21.0, 20.5)
- **Kodi OS:** (e.g., LibreELEC, Windows, Linux, macOS, Android)
- **Addon Version:** (e.g., 0.0.9)
- **NLZiet Subscription:** (Standard, Plus, etc.)

## Add-on Dependencies
- **inputstream.adaptive:** Version? Enabled?
- **inputstream.helper:** Version? Installed?

---

## Debug Log
If this is a playback or functionality issue, include a debug log:
1. Enable debug logging in NLZiet settings
2. Reproduce the issue
3. Upload log to [https://paste.kodi.tv/](https://paste.kodi.tv/)

**Log URL:** 

---

## Expected Behavior
What were you expecting to happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead?

## Screenshots / Video
Attach screenshots or video if helpful.

---

## Additional Notes
Any other information that might help resolve your issue?

**Note:** For faster support, please also check:
- [NLZiet Kodi Addon Documentation](https://github.com/Nigel1992/NLZiet-Kodi-Addon)
- [Kodi Wiki](https://kodi.wiki/)
- [Kodi Forum](https://forum.kodi.tv/)
